description: Dest pipeline for m_26_14-score-entity transform (Stage 1). Receives one entity-store doc per canonical or discovered host entity and scores it for inventory freshness and coverage. Enriches: (1) m_26_14-inventory by host.name -> asset.* (canonical marker: enrich succeeds IFF the entity maps back to an inventory row by hostname); (2) m_26_14-observed by host.name -> last_log, first_log, datasets, skew_exceeded; (3) m_26_14-config-enrich -> thresholds. Produces a combined element:'asset' doc per entity with score_inventory (0/1), score_coverage (0/1), effective_horizon_days, is_canonical, provenance, and quadrant. Deterministic _id = 'asset::<effective_asset_id>'. Phase 1 NOTE: spine IP-fold (folding observed-<ip>@collector entries into canonical entities via host.ip) is deferred to Phase 2 -- only exact host.name enrich matching is performed. Entities only discoverable via IP-keyed observed entries will appear as expected_silent until Phase 2.

enrich.description: Join to inventory by host.name. Success = canonical; failure = discovered/unexpected
Join to observed ledger by host.name

set.description: Stamp ingest now() as a parseable string (ctx._ingest is null in this ingest context; Mustache _ingest.timestamp works)

script.description: Compute inventory/coverage scores, provenance, effective_horizon_days, and shape the asset score doc
script.source: String hostName = ctx.host?.name ?: ''; String storeAssetId = ctx.asset?.id; def invData = ctx._inv; def obsData = ctx._obs; String provenance; boolean isCanonical; String effectiveAssetId; String component = 'unassigned'; if (invData != null) { provenance = 'inventory'; isCanonical = true; effectiveAssetId = invData.asset?.id ?: (storeAssetId ?: ctx.entity?.id ?: hostName); def comp = invData.asset?.component; if (comp != null && comp != '') component = comp.toLowerCase(); } else if (storeAssetId != null) { provenance = 'store_retained'; isCanonical = true; effectiveAssetId = storeAssetId; } else { String rt = ctx.entity?.relationships?.resolution?.resolved_to; if (rt != null) { provenance = 'resolution_target'; isCanonical = true; effectiveAssetId = rt; } else { provenance = 'unexpected'; isCanonical = false; effectiveAssetId = 'unexpected:' + hostName; } } String lastLog = obsData?.last_log; String firstLog = obsData?.first_log; def datasets = obsData?.datasets; long skewCount = 0L; def sk = obsData?.skew_exceeded; if (sk instanceof Map) { skewCount = (sk.count != null ? (long)sk.count : 0L); } boolean fresh = false; if (lastLog != null) { long nowMs = ZonedDateTime.parse(ctx._now).toInstant().toEpochMilli(); long lastMs = ZonedDateTime.parse(lastLog).toInstant().toEpochMilli(); fresh = (nowMs - lastMs) <= (7L * 86400000L); } boolean hasCoverage = (datasets instanceof Map && !datasets.isEmpty()); List datasetList = []; if (hasCoverage) { datasetList = new ArrayList(datasets.keySet()); Collections.sort(datasetList); } double effectiveHorizonDays = 0.0; if (firstLog != null) { long nowMs = ZonedDateTime.parse(ctx._now).toInstant().toEpochMilli(); long firstMs = ZonedDateTime.parse(firstLog).toInstant().toEpochMilli(); effectiveHorizonDays = Math.max(0.0, (double)(nowMs - firstMs) / 86400000.0); } String quadrant; if (isCanonical) { quadrant = fresh ? 'expected_observed' : 'expected_silent'; } else { quadrant = 'unexpected_observed'; } ctx.element = 'asset'; ctx.run_id = 'engine'; ctx.asset = ['id': effectiveAssetId, 'component': component]; ctx.score_inventory = (byte)(fresh ? 1 : 0); ctx.score_coverage = (byte)(hasCoverage ? 1 : 0); ctx.provenance = provenance; ctx.is_canonical = isCanonical; ctx.effective_horizon_days = effectiveHorizonDays; ctx.datasets = datasetList; ctx._id = 'asset::' + effectiveAssetId; ctx.evidence = ['quadrant': quadrant, 'join': (obsData != null ? 'exact' : 'none'), 'last_log': lastLog, 'first_log': firstLog, 'fresh_within_days': 7, 'datasets': datasetList, 'effective_horizon_days': effectiveHorizonDays, 'skew_events': skewCount, 'provenance': provenance, 'resolution_closure': 'single_hop']; ctx.remove('_inv'); ctx.remove('_obs'); ctx.remove('_cfg'); ctx.remove('config_key');
